hooks.command:
printf '
  [station prepped]
  Mise en place. Fresh herbs. A pot of water on for the pasta.
  Take it slow. There is no rush.

'
echo '👨‍🍳 service is over. wipe down the bench. the dish was — by all accounts — fine.'
echo '👨‍🍳 [taste test] Always before service, never after.'
echo '👨‍🍳 [mise en place] Pulling ingredients from the pantry. Don'\''t cook until the bench is set.'
echo '👨‍🍳 [chef'\''s warning] You are sending it to the pass with the heat still on. Acknowledged.'
echo '👨‍🍳 ✓ plated. send it to the pass.'
